critical_code_review_comments: WebsitePage.jsx reduced from 1686 to 449 lines - clean separation of concerns
PlanningPage.jsx reduced from 763 to 573 lines - banners and search extracted
All imports correctly use relative paths (../../../lib/ for nested components)
data-testid attributes preserved for all interactive elements
No console errors related to refactoring (only minor React hydration warnings from dev tools)
